$comment: Consent test-catalog (ADR-0005, A22). dart run build_runner build projects this into consent_fixture.g.dart (typed factory registry) + consent_fixture.g.json (LLM tool schema with x-actions). Edit THIS file, then re-run the builder; the generator-in-sync test guards the committed artifacts. node/field bind the genesis_perception species (A22); counter is a stateful, actionable component whose State implements genesis_consent's Actionable seam.

catalog.name: consent_fixture
catalog.description: Consent action-router test catalog: perception Node/Field plus a stateful Counter that affords press/set, so the enforce/reject hit-test runs against a real mounted tree.

node.description: A named container component. Holds an ordered list of child components referenced by id.

name.description: Structural name of this node in the measurement.

field.description: A named value leaf holding a single string datum. Cannot have children.

name.description: Name of this datum within the measurement.

value.description: Measured string value at configuration time.

counter.description: A stateful integer counter leaf. Holds a live count and re-renders it; affords client actions.

press.description: Increment the count by context.amount (integer, optional, default 1).

set.description: Overwrite the count with context.value (integer, required). Last write wins.
